error.message_pattern:
No\ matching\ signature\ for\ function\ SUBSTR\
\ \ Argument\ types:\ STRING\
\ \ Signature:\ SUBSTR\(STRING,\ INT64,\ \[INT64\]\)\
\ \ \ \ Signature\ requires\ at\ least\ 2\ arguments,\ found\ 1\ argument\
\ \ Signature:\ SUBSTR\(BYTES,\ INT64,\ \[INT64\]\)\
\ \ \ \ Signature\ requires\ at\ least\ 2\ arguments,\ found\ 1\ argument\ at\ \[\d+:\d+\]
error.message_sample:
No matching signature for function SUBSTR
  Argument types: STRING
  Signature: SUBSTR(STRING, INT64, [INT64])
    Signature requires at least 2 arguments, found 1 argument
  Signature: SUBSTR(BYTES, INT64, [INT64])
    Signature requires at least 2 arguments, found 1 argument at [1:8]
